name: subflows k8s observability checks
description: Capture Kubernetes deployment logs to pair infrastructure context with the Dog API insight report.

tasks.name: observability print prelude
tasks.description: Signal the start of the Kubernetes log snapshot sequence.

tasks.name: observability mock logs
tasks.description: Provide a deterministic log sample for environments without Kubernetes.

tasks.name: observability verify logs
tasks.description: Verify the log retrieval succeeded before persisting the snippet for later reporting.

else.exit: Failed to capture Kubernetes logs; stopping the pipeline.

tasks.name: observability print preview
tasks.description: Expose a preview of the captured Kubernetes logs.
